title: 60 Pieces Mouse Detail Sanding Sheets, 90x140mm Detail Sander Paper Assorted 40/60/80/120/180/240 Grits, Triangle Sander Sandpaper 5 Holes Hook and Loop, for Black and Decker Detail Palm Sander
features: 【Sandpaper Contents 】The sandpaper set consists of 60 pieces sandpaper in 6 different grits with 92 x 140 mm, including coarse and fine grits 10x P40, 10 x P60, 10 x P80, 10 x P120, 10x180, 10 x P240 for virtually all your polishing needs.

【 Sanding sheets size 】Sheet size approx. 140 x 92 mm, with 5 dust holes, easy to use with self-adhesive hook and loop, suitable for rectangular sanding machines, please check if the sanding machine base plate fits the size of the sanding paper.

【Sanding sheets material 】These sanding pads made of high quality alumina grit and high strength resin, has a long service life, is durable and remains stable with little wear even during long sanding, a good choice for sanding and polishing.
【Backing Technology】With the hook and loop fastener on the back, the rectangular detail sanding sheet can be easily and firmly attached to the sander for easy installation and removal.

【Wide Application】140x92 mm hook and loop sanding disc are widely used to wipe and polish rust on metal surfaces, such as leather, rubber, wood, plastic, glass, stone, application for polishing and buffing.
description: Product Description AUNHOKE 60 pcs mouse sandpaper for delta sanders and multi-sanders, good choice for sanding and polishing: 1. Mouse sandpapers are made from aluminium oxide abrasive, durable and anti-static, the grit is larger, the polishing effect is finer, Long service life. 2. Triangle sandpapers suitable for use with 140x 90mm delta sanders. 3.Hook and loop and 5 punched holes for dust extraction, Firmly adheres to the sander. Specifications: Name: triangle sandpaper Abrasive: aluminum oxide Quantity: 60 pcs Size: 140x90mm Colour: reddish brown Punched: 5 holes Back technology: hook and loop,fiber backing Package Content: 10 x 40 grit triangle sandpaper 10 x 60 grit triangle sandpaper 10 x 80 grit triangle sandpaper 10 x 120 grit triangle sandpaper 10 x 180 grit triangle sandpaper 10 x 240 grit triangle sandpaper Wide Application: The sanding sheets suitable for various sanding tasks, including metal polishing, and surface preparation for painting. It is a versatile tool that can be used by DIY. Warm Note: 1. Please frequently check and replace the sander base plate when it wears out. 2. Please use it in dry place,don't store it in wet condition.
